launcher.title: App Launcher
launcher.description: The App Launcher gives you access to all apps and system settings in your vault.

settings.title: Settings
settings.description: Open Settings from here. Let's look at the most important sections.

extensions.title: Extensions
extensions.description: Install extensions like haex-pass for passwords or haex-notes for notes from the Marketplace.

spacesOverview.title: Spaces
spacesOverview.description: Spaces are shared areas for collaboration. Create one here, or join via an invite. You already have your personal space.

spacesInvite.title: Add people
spacesInvite.description: Use this button to invite people to a space — as a contact or via an invite link. Best tried on a space you share with others.

spacesShare.title: Share folders & files
spacesShare.description: Add folders or files to a space here. They sync to everyone who is a member of that space.

sync.title: Sync
sync.description: Connect a sync server to keep your vault in sync across all your devices.
